channel.title: hackrabbits (complete)
channel.description: Persistent RSS feed for hackrabbits's releases containing complete on Nyaa

item.title: He Became the Only Ally of the Abandoned Warrior [Complete][KR Web Novel] 버림받은 용사의 유일한 아군이 되었다.

Regression Soldier’s Female Conquest Diary! [Complete][KR Web Novel] 회귀병사의 암컷 정복 일지!
The Academy’s Weakest Became A Demon-Limited Hunter [Complete][KR Web Novel] 아카데미 최약체는 마족 한정 먼치킨이 되었다

My Friend's Harem Is Obsessed With Me [Complete][KR Web Novel] 친구 하렘이 나한테 집착한다
The Live Broadcast of an Unemployed Fox [Complete][KR Web Novel] 개백수 여우의 라이브 방송
The Chosen One Was Me, Not You [Complete][KR Web Novel] 선택 받은 자는 네가 아닌 나였다
Saintess, the Hero is Not a Vending Machine! [Complete][KR Web Novel] 성녀님, 용사는 자판기가 아니에요!
Returned as the World's Strongest [Complete][KR Web Novel] 귀환했더니 세계최강

Promotion ~A Pawn Becomes Stronger When TSed~ [Complete][KR Web Novel] 프로모션 ~폰은 TS하면 강해져~

My Summons Are Special [Complete][KR Web Novel] 내 소환수는 특별하다
Munchkin Disciple Wants to Stop Being Obsessed Over [Complete][KR Web Novel] 먼치킨 제자는 그만 집착받고 싶다
I’m Way Too Compatible with My Arranged Marriage Partner [Complete][KR Web Novel] 정략결혼 상대와 궁합이 너무 잘 맞는다
I’m the Slit-Eyed Side Character, Not the Heroine [Complete][KR Web Novel] 2인자 실눈캐 입니다. 히로인 아닙니다
I Wished for Non-Face-to-Face Lectures [Complete][KR Web Novel] 비대면 강의를 소원으로 빌었다
I Slept With My Best Friend For One Night [Complete][KR Web Novel] 최애와 하룻밤을 자버렸다
I Will NEVER Date You! [Complete][KR Web Novel] 너랑은 절! 대! 안 사귈거니까!
